description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a striking contrast between black and white exterior walls. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. Multiple balconies and terraces are present, some furnished with outdoor seating and tables, enhancing the living space and offering outdoor leisure areas. The house has a minimalist design with clean lines, and the windows are arranged in both large panels and smaller, asymmetrical placements. The roof is flat and appears to be accessible, possibly serving as an additional outdoor area. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, emphasizing modern architectural trends.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and contrasting black and white exterior walls. Features multiple balconies and a minimalist, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, two balconies with outdoor furniture, and a prominent black facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white exterior wall, a balcony, and a large garage-style window on the lower level.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mix of window sizes, mostly white walls, and minimal balcony presence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a black wall and two large windows, minimal architectural detailing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, flush with the facade, and is accessible via a balcony or terrace with minimal decorative elements.
